title: Fluffy Kenyan Banana Stir-fry
description: An earthy and fluffy lazy-sunday dish featuring diabetic-friendly ingredients like banana, whipping cream, and a touch of coconut milk for added flavor.
instructions: Slice the bananas into thin rounds.
In a mixing bowl, combine banana slices with coconut milk and vanilla extract. Mix well.
Sprinkle with almond flour and sugar-free cocoa powder if using, then toss gently to coat evenly.
Add whipping cream to the mixture and mix thoroughly until smooth.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Once hot, add the banana slices and cook for about 5 minutes on each side or until golden brown and caramelized slightly.
Transfer cooked banana slices onto a serving plate. Drizzle with additional whipping cream to serve.
